reviews.review_description:
Initially, was very fun & convinceing to be good game during free trial, so I bought it.
After that, & defeating 1st opponent, it then became a slow decent away from fun & into the relm of frustration:
Technique/Force doesn't seem to matter at all, haveing to keep going into the 3 training exercises to build up health tollerance & slap power is monotinous & tedious, basketball training is sheer frustration, lots of glitches in gameplay that haven't been fixed, no assention of opponents' imagery that intimidate or reflect their increased strength, (& lastly) I was able to eventually trudge through 'til end ...& the last guy's not even fightable! ...it merely reverts to the punch-dummy from the training program!!!
There were fun times -- I don't want to overlook that -- but those're primarily overshadowed by all the annoying, frustrating things with the gameplay.
Barely any good people to slap and the basketball sucks ￼
Slapping is quite fun but Michael keeps on lagging if this was fixed it would be so much better overall it is really fun

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback! We're glad to hear you're having fun with the slapping feature. We’re aware of the lag issue and are working hard to fix it in future updates. Stay tuned, and we appreciate your patience!
Thank you so much for your comment :)

reviews.review_description: With its separate modes offering distinct excitement - slap fighting, basketball, and climbing - this game promises an extraordinary experience. Definitely worth trying.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your comment :)

reviews.review_description: Very fun overall but the basketball is impossible. It’s a little bit harder for short people like me and until you until you realize oh, I’m gonna lose this fight you need to upgrade. I would’ve given it a five star but the basketball is atrocious. But I would still buy and maybe if you’re interested in a type of game like this just look in Apple app and type in slap and it brings up a five dollar game and if you enjoy it maybe you can do this.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your comment :)

reviews.review_description:
First impressions gameplay here (remove the space before 'be'):


https://youtu. be/Zy1dPNOSV4I


The scale of the characters is a bit amusingly odd, and I'm not sure how much difference a harder swing does in relation to damage dealt, but nevertheless - giving somebody a good slap never gets old!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your comment :)

reviews.review_description:
-Way to much money
-Very little content
-Jankie mechanics
-Completely silent
-Not entertaining
-Can’t even finish the story mode

developer_response.body: We’re sorry to hear that you didn’t enjoy your experience. We truly appreciate your feedback, as it helps us improve. We’re constantly working on updates to fix issues and add more content. Hopefully, future updates will address the concerns you raised. Thank you for sharing your thoughts.
